name: RABBIT-FEATURE-BUG-2
title: feature.json surface.skills empty and contract.md reads.files empty despite known surface/reads
description:
Two related drifts:
1. feature.json declares surface.skills: [] but the entire feature exists to publish skills/rabbit-feature-touch/SKILL.md (also declared in contract.md provides.skills). surface.skills should list the skill.
2. contract.md declares reads.files: [] but Inv 4 (and its test test-build-source-points-to-rabbit-feature.py) both read .claude/features/contract/build-contract.json. Per the Machine-First philosophy 'Read nothing outside the contract.' this cross-feature read must be declared in reads.files.
Fix: populate feature.json surface.skills with the rabbit-feature-touch skill entry, populate contract.md reads.files with the build-contract.json read declaration.
